protocol.candidate_arm_requirement: model+best-of-n arms must include bo1 and at least one bo>1

safe_claims: This repo now supports a reviewer-auditable BEST-Route adjacent import path.
Imports are validated for workflow-stage declarations, candidate-arm structure, and explicit adjacent-only scope.
not_safe_claims: Direct apples-to-apples BEST-Route reproduction inside this repo.
Control-space equivalence between BEST-Route bo-arm routing and this repo's frontier/action substrate.
